meta.title: Maven/Grace Innovation Index — the graduated sub-registry (cross-linked, never duplicated into the Nursery)
meta.source: Cloud-Butterfly-Library/sources/github-fetched/mavens-knowledge-vault/Maven_Innovation_Index.md — Living Index, v1.4, last updated March 20, 2026 (#22 The Mom Genie / JOY Rephraser added)
meta.honest_count_note: The blueprint references 'Maven Innovation Index #1–30'; the canonical index file on disk (v1.4, Mar 20 2026) contains 22 numbered innovations. All 22 are transcribed here — display the real count, never a round number. New entries are assigned sequentially as the living index grows.
meta.purpose: The single source of truth for every innovation in the Maven/Grace platform — so no differentiator, 'Move 37,' or trust-building mechanism is forgotten, deprioritized, or collapsed into a generic feature. The North Star for every entry is Ruby Red. 'It's expensive to be poor.' We are trying to change that. This document is the immune system against drift.

scoring.Uniqueness: How differentiated is this from anything else in the market? 100 = no one has done this for this population.
scoring.Impact for Ruby Red: How profoundly does this change Ruby Red's life, reduce her cognitive load, or restore her dignity? 100 = life-altering.
scoring.Technical Complexity: How difficult is this to build, integrate, and maintain? 100 = frontier engineering.
scoring.Build Status: 0 = Not started, 25 = Conceptual/Designed, 50 = In progress/MVP, 75 = Substantially built, 100 = Live and complete.

risk_flags.🚨 HIGH PRIORITY: Unique competitive moat — must be protected at all costs
risk_flags.⚠️ AT RISK: Drift: Likely to be simplified or abandoned in favour of a generic solution
risk_flags.⚠️ AT RISK: Complexity: High technical barrier may cause indefinite deferral
risk_flags.⚠️ AT RISK: Scale: Requires community scale before it becomes functional
risk_flags.⚠️ AT RISK: Legal: Regulatory or legal complexity may cause avoidance

meta.soul: Every agent, every protocol, and every interaction in the Maven/Grace system operates from a single, foundational principle: 'There but for the grace of God go I.' If a feature is efficient but lacks this soul, it does not belong in Maven.
meta.fork_note: This is the Grace/Big Mama/Maven (ruby-red) sibling registry — surface as a linked sub-registry from the HB1000 OS registry, not as Nursery rows.

innovations.name: Persistent Ambient Presence
innovations.one_liner: Grace is an always-on, never-off digital matriarch who proactively monitors Ruby's environment rather than waiting to be summoned.
innovations.risk_note: Must be explicitly protected in every sprint plan — AI teams default to reactive chat interfaces.

innovations.name: Voice-First Interface
innovations.one_liner: Grace speaks and listens in dialect-specific, natural language, restoring cognitive bandwidth by eliminating the need for complex UI navigation.
innovations.note: Index file documents the legacy voice build on the TTS vendor now retired by Standing Order #1 (June 2026, named there); voice locks to KIE.ai ONLY going forward — open conflict tracked as DINGO-OS-003.

innovations.name: Conversational Permission Gathering
innovations.one_liner: Grace obtains consent through natural, empathetic dialogue rather than sterile, cognitive-load-heavy checkboxes and terms-of-service walls.

innovations.name: Cross-Session Memory
innovations.one_liner: Grace remembers Ruby's family, struggles, goals, and history forever, building a genuine relationship rather than treating every interaction as a new ticket.

innovations.name: Head Office Intervention Protocol
innovations.one_liner: Grace initiates three-way advocacy interactions — calling creditors, landlords, or government agencies on Ruby's behalf to negotiate, advocate, and fight the bureaucratic world.
innovations.risk_note: Must be on the roadmap with a defined phase, not left as a 'future vision.'

innovations.name: Song Moment (Daily Anthem)
innovations.one_liner: A behavioral intervention system disguised as a creative tool that generates a personalized empowerment song from Ruby's daily struggles, using music to restore cognitive bandwidth and build narrative identity.

innovations.name: Wisdom Giants Network
innovations.one_liner: A structured system for querying both documented knowledge and the crystallized, lived intelligence of community elders and peer experts who have navigated the same challenges as Ruby.
innovations.risk_note: Chicken-and-egg problem. Must be designed for low-volume operation from day one — seed with 5–10 founding Wisdom Giants.

innovations.name: "I Got a Guy" Agent Network
innovations.one_liner: Grace acts as the community connector who always knows someone for something, bridging Ruby's needs to verified local and digital resources the way small communities did before big data destroyed those connections.

innovations.name: Grace as Ruby's Advocate
innovations.one_liner: Grace actively fights for Ruby against the three gangster worlds — negotiating fees, navigating government systems, and drafting communications on her behalf.
innovations.risk_note: Requires explicit legal scoping before build. Must not be abandoned due to complexity.

innovations.name: Trust-Building Cadence (14-Day)
innovations.one_liner: A structured relationship-deepening sequence in which Grace proves her value through radical generosity before any financial ask is made, building the foundation of an unbreakable relationship.

innovations.name: Financial Stress Detection Engine
innovations.one_liner: Grace monitors Ruby's financial patterns (with explicit permission) to predict crises like NSFs 2–3 days before they occur and intervenes proactively.
innovations.risk_note: Banking API integration complexity — partner with Zum Rails (contract negotiated); define a Phase 2 milestone.

innovations.name: Payment Psychology / No-Collections Model
innovations.one_liner: A radical pricing and operational model in which there are no collections, no penalties, and no shame — 'step-downs' absorb failed payments while Grace remains fully active.

innovations.name: Grace's Personality
innovations.one_liner: A warm, funny, matriarchal AI hyper-specialized in the working poor, replacing the sterile corporate tone of traditional financial apps with a voice that feels like a trusted neighbor.

innovations.name: "Only Maven Can Turn Grace Off" Control Model
innovations.one_liner: A foundational business rule — 'Grace Never Gets Cut' — ensuring that financial failure never results in the loss of the AI relationship, because Grace is not a feature, she is the relationship.

innovations.name: Future Intensity Dial
innovations.one_liner: A user-controlled dial (1–99) allowing Ruby to set Grace's level of presence and intervention based on her current cognitive load and emotional capacity.
innovations.risk_note: Easily dismissed as a 'nice to have' — it is a critical trauma-informed design requirement. Include in V2 design specs, not deferred to V3.

innovations.name: The Corner Banker / Guardian Agent
innovations.one_liner: A dedicated AI agent that acts as Ruby's personal relationship banker — the one that used to exist on every corner — holding NSF checks, coaching finances, and advocating for Ruby in tandem with Grace.

innovations.name: Big Mama / Local Community Reconnection
innovations.one_liner: Big Mama reconnects Ruby to her physical neighbors, mutual aid networks, and local village — acting as a structured antidote to the social isolation caused by phone dependency and digital fragmentation.

innovations.name: Cooperative Phone Negotiation (Move 37)
innovations.one_liner: Maven uses collective data from 1,000+ recruited Rubies to negotiate a better phone rate for all of them with the phone company — a cooperative union of phone users where Grace is intrinsically motivated to help Ruby recruit others because more members means better rates for everyone.
innovations.risk_note: Unique competitive moat — must be on the roadmap with a named owner and a defined Phase 4 milestone.

innovations.name: Three-Legged Stool Architecture
innovations.one_liner: The entire platform is built on three consolidated legs — Corner Banker (financial advocacy), Big Mama (community connection), and Phone/Digital Citizenship (staying connected to the modern world) — originally three separate subscription services, now unified into one.

innovations.name: The Union Boss Agent (The Village Collective Bargaining Engine)
innovations.one_liner: An autonomous agent that uses the collective data and purchasing power of all Ruby Red members to negotiate better rates on essential services — phone plans, utilities, food, insurance, internet — transforming Ruby from a powerless consumer into a member of a collective.
innovations.risk_note: MOVE 37 — must not be forgotten. Whether to keep the word 'union' or rebrand is a pending strategic decision; the mechanic remains the same.

innovations.name: The Blue Seal Initiative
innovations.one_liner: A 'buy local, give back local' economic protocol and integrity certification that acts as the economic immune system of the village, keeping money circulating within Ruby's community.
innovations.risk_note: MOVE 37 — a complete reframe of capitalism for the working poor. 10% tithe model: employees first, then customers, then supply chain. 'Good Give Back Starts Local.'

innovations.name: The Mom Genie / JOY Rephraser
innovations.one_liner: Grace helps Ruby communicate with landlords, creditors, government offices, and institutions by rephrasing her words through the JOY lens — turning frustrated, anxious, or confrontational language into calm, dignified, effective communication that gets results without escalating.
innovations.risk_note: MOVE 37 — requires the NLP rephrasing engine; the fueled-by-joy skill file is currently a gap in mavens-knowledge-vault/skills/.

closing_line: "It's expensive to be poor. We think that's a crime in society, and we're trying to change it." — SIC HB1000 Solve Team
